clues.clue: Refuse vessel entry to port after coast beset by snow?

Perhaps attempt to pick up unopened post by large tree houses
Skate around east end of London’s Strand
Take in AC/DC, appearing in one minute, live
Exaggerated ruggedness of individual waterproof Jiffy bags
Standing opposite to Siberian tiger cages
Internally survey dozens in preparation for meeting
A tenor’s behind short hum in charming hymn
Fetching earth to go on crop
Ice age left trace of chilly fronts
Craft is able to make controlled descent

Piano parts refined by small cast?

Lay gilded china before king

Fly round and round in ballroom dance

Asian’s inside borders at large plant

Hang around, dropping in for a beer
